div.head:
No. 32.
Hawaiian corporations other than sugar plantations.
div.p: [From latest official returns, June, 1893. E. and O. Ex. Thos. G. Thrum.]

head.hi: Hawaiian corporations other than sugar plantations, showing amount of investments therein and nationality of stockholders in each.

frus:attachment.p: [Compiled June, 1893, from latest official returns for His Excellency, J. H. Blount, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary of the United States.]

row.cell: Hamakua & S. Kohala T. & T. Co
Hilo and Hawaii T. & T. Co
North Pacific Phos. And Fert. Co.
Oahu R. R. and Land Co
Hamakua & S. Kohala T. & T. Co
North Pacific Phos. and Fert. Co
Oahu R. R. and Land Co

frus:attachment.p: E. & O. Ex.
Honolulu, June 26, 1893.
c. brewer & co., honolulu, oahu.
[Hawaiian corporation; capital stock, $600,000, in shares of $100 par value.]
summary.

summary.

[Hawaiian corporation; capital stock $2,000, in shares of $5 par value each.]

summary.

[Hawaiian corporation; capital stock $150,000, in shares of $100 par value.]

[Hawaiian corporation; capital stock, $425,000, in shares of $100 par value each.]
